svg.title: Pi agent loop matrix reference
svg.desc: A row-based matrix of all twenty-two agent loop steps, emitted events, injection points, and explanations of what each hook or seam is.
svg.text: Each row matches the numbered flow on the page. Events show what subscribers see; injection points show where custom behavior can enter and what kind of seam it is.
Begin a new loop invocation; prompt
Agent.prompt(). extension input is an ExtensionRunner
event that can transform/handle input. before_agent_start
is an extension event emitted before the low-level Agent
Read queued steering messages typed while
AgentLoopConfig callback supplied by Agent; drains
Open a new assistant turn after the first
Loop lifecycle event. UI/session subscribers can observe
it; not usually an injection point.
Agent.steer() injects messages after the current turn.
Agent.followUp() waits until the agent would otherwise
AgentLoopConfig callback. Coding-agent wires it to
prune/inject/reorder messages before each provider call.
implementation lives in core/messages.ts and filters or
The loop builds pi-ai Context. System prompt and active
tools are prepared earlier by AgentSession.
Resolve per-request API key if configured.
Request assistant stream from pi-ai or
streamFn is injected into Agent. SDK supplies one that
resolves auth/headers then calls pi-ai streamSimple().
onPayload/onResponse are provider hooks bridged to
message_update repeats for text, thinking, and tool-call
deltas. UI uses this for live rendering.
The partial assistant in context is replaced by the final
Error/abort path skips tool execution and ends the run.
Scan final assistant content for toolCall
Find tool, prepare args, validate schema,
beforeToolCall is low-level Agent hook; coding-agent
bridges it to extension tool_call, which can block
Execute tool and stream partial updates.
performs work. onUpdate emits partial tool state for
afterToolCall is low-level Agent hook; coding-agent
bridges it to extension tool_result, which can replace
Append toolResult messages to context and
ToolResultMessage.content goes back to the model; details
Emit completed assistant turn and tool
Subscribers see the assistant message plus all tool
Allow graceful stop after the completed
AgentLoopConfig callback. Return true to emit agent_end
Tool results normally trigger another assistant turn. If
no tool work remains, steering is checked first, then
No more work remains; finish the loop.
Final loop event. Agent becomes idle only after awaited
hook/callback/extension seam where behavior can be injected
Blank cells mean pure loop mechanics, not a recommended customization seam.
